facts: THE BIBLE WAS WRITTEN OVER A PERIOD OF 1,500 YEARS BY 40 DIFFERENT AUTHORS!
THE SHORTEST VERSE IN THE BIBLE IS JOHN 11:35 - 'JESUS WEPT.'
THE LONGEST VERSE IN THE BIBLE IS ESTHER 8:9 WITH 90 WORDS!
THE BIBLE HAS BEEN TRANSLATED INTO OVER 3,000 LANGUAGES!
THE BIBLE IS THE BEST-SELLING BOOK OF ALL TIME WITH OVER 5 BILLION COPIES SOLD!
PSALM 117 IS THE SHORTEST CHAPTER IN THE BIBLE WITH ONLY 2 VERSES!
PSALM 119 IS THE LONGEST CHAPTER WITH 176 VERSES!
THE WORD 'BIBLE' COMES FROM THE GREEK WORD 'BIBLIA' MEANING 'BOOKS'!
THE BIBLE CONTAINS 66 BOOKS - 39 IN THE OLD TESTAMENT AND 27 IN THE NEW TESTAMENT!
THE OLD TESTAMENT WAS PRIMARILY WRITTEN IN HEBREW!
THE NEW TESTAMENT WAS WRITTEN IN GREEK!
THE BIBLE CONTAINS 1,189 CHAPTERS AND 31,102 VERSES!
THE MIDDLE CHAPTER OF THE BIBLE IS PSALM 117!
METHUSELAH LIVED 969 YEARS - THE OLDEST PERSON IN THE BIBLE!
KING JAMES VERSION WAS COMPLETED IN 1611!
THE GUTENBERG BIBLE WAS THE FIRST BOOK PRINTED WITH MOVABLE TYPE IN 1455!
JESUS IS MENTIONED BY NAME 983 TIMES IN THE BIBLE!
THE WORD 'LOVE' APPEARS 310 TIMES IN THE KING JAMES VERSION!
THE WORD 'LORD' APPEARS 7,736 TIMES IN THE BIBLE!
THERE ARE 185 SONGS IN THE BIBLE INCLUDING ALL 150 PSALMS!
THE BIBLE MENTIONS 8 DIFFERENT TYPES OF ANGELS!
DAVID WROTE 73 OF THE 150 PSALMS!
THE BOOK OF ESTHER NEVER MENTIONS GOD BY NAME!
THE ARK OF THE COVENANT WAS 3.75 FEET LONG AND 2.25 FEET WIDE!
NOAH'S ARK WAS APPROXIMATELY 450 FEET LONG - LARGER THAN A FOOTBALL FIELD!
JONAH WAS IN THE BELLY OF THE GREAT FISH FOR 3 DAYS AND 3 NIGHTS!
THERE ARE OVER 300 PROPHECIES ABOUT JESUS IN THE OLD TESTAMENT!
THE DEAD SEA SCROLLS DISCOVERED IN 1947 CONTAIN PORTIONS OF EVERY OLD TESTAMENT BOOK EXCEPT ESTHER!
THE BIBLE WAS DIVIDED INTO CHAPTERS IN 1227 BY STEPHEN LANGTON!
VERSE DIVISIONS WERE ADDED IN 1551 BY ROBERT ESTIENNE!
THE GARDEN OF EDEN HAD FOUR RIVERS: PISHON, GIHON, TIGRIS, AND EUPHRATES!
GOLIATH WAS APPROXIMATELY 9 FEET 9 INCHES TALL!
SOLOMON HAD 700 WIVES AND 300 CONCUBINES!
KING SOLOMON WROTE 3,000 PROVERBS AND 1,005 SONGS!
THE TEN COMMANDMENTS WERE WRITTEN ON TWO STONE TABLETS!
MOSES LED THE ISRAELITES FOR 40 YEARS IN THE WILDERNESS!
JESUS PERFORMED 37 RECORDED MIRACLES IN THE GOSPELS!
JESUS TOLD 46 PARABLES IN THE GOSPELS!
THE LORD'S PRAYER HAS 66 WORDS IN THE KING JAMES VERSION!
THERE WERE 12 APOSTLES CHOSEN BY JESUS!
PAUL WROTE 13 BOOKS OF THE NEW TESTAMENT!
THE BOOK OF REVELATION MENTIONS 7 CHURCHES IN ASIA MINOR!
THE WALLS OF JERICHO FELL AFTER THE ISRAELITES MARCHED AROUND THEM 13 TIMES!
DANIEL WAS IN THE LIONS' DEN FOR ONE NIGHT!
SHADRACH, MESHACH AND ABEDNEGO SURVIVED THE FIERY FURNACE!
THE WISE MEN BROUGHT 3 GIFTS: GOLD, FRANKINCENSE, AND MYRRH!
JESUS WAS BAPTIZED IN THE JORDAN RIVER BY JOHN THE BAPTIST!
JESUS FASTED FOR 40 DAYS AND 40 NIGHTS IN THE WILDERNESS!
THE LAST SUPPER TOOK PLACE ON THE EVE OF PASSOVER!
JESUS WAS CRUCIFIED AT A PLACE CALLED GOLGOTHA - 'THE PLACE OF THE SKULL'!
THE FIRST FIVE BOOKS OF THE BIBLE ARE CALLED THE PENTATEUCH OR TORAH!
THE BIBLE MENTIONS OVER 50 DIFFERENT TYPES OF ANIMALS!
ABRAHAM WAS 100 YEARS OLD WHEN ISAAC WAS BORN!
JACOB HAD 12 SONS WHO BECAME THE 12 TRIBES OF ISRAEL!
JOSEPH'S COAT OF MANY COLORS WAS A SIGN OF HIS FATHER'S FAVOR!
SAMSON'S STRENGTH WAS IN HIS UNCUT HAIR AS A NAZIRITE VOW!
RUTH WAS KING DAVID'S GREAT-GRANDMOTHER!
THE TEMPLE OF SOLOMON TOOK 7 YEARS TO BUILD!
ELIJAH WAS TAKEN UP TO HEAVEN IN A CHARIOT OF FIRE!
JOHN THE BAPTIST ATE LOCUSTS AND WILD HONEY!
JESUS TURNED WATER INTO WINE AT THE WEDDING IN CANA - HIS FIRST MIRACLE!
LAZARUS WAS DEAD FOR 4 DAYS BEFORE JESUS RAISED HIM!
PETER WALKED ON WATER TOWARD JESUS!
JESUS FED 5,000 MEN (PLUS WOMEN AND CHILDREN) WITH 5 LOAVES AND 2 FISH!
ZACCHAEUS CLIMBED A SYCAMORE TREE TO SEE JESUS!
PAUL WAS SHIPWRECKED 3 TIMES DURING HIS MISSIONARY JOURNEYS!
THE EARLY CHURCH MET IN HOMES BEFORE HAVING DEDICATED BUILDINGS!
PENTECOST OCCURRED 50 DAYS AFTER EASTER!
3,000 PEOPLE WERE BAPTIZED ON THE DAY OF PENTECOST!
THE APOSTLE JOHN LIVED THE LONGEST AND DIED OF NATURAL CAUSES!

DID YOU KNOW? MARTIN LUTHER'S HYMN 'A MIGHTY FORTRESS' IS STILL SUNG TODAY!
DID YOU KNOW? JOHN CALVIN WROTE 'INSTITUTES OF THE CHRISTIAN RELIGION' AT AGE 26!

DID YOU KNOW? CALVIN'S TEACHINGS INFLUENCED THE PILGRIMS WHO CAME TO AMERICA!

DID YOU KNOW? BILLY GRAHAM'S CRUSADES REACHED PEOPLE IN 185 COUNTRIES!

DID YOU KNOW? C.S. LEWIS WAS AN ATHEIST BEFORE BECOMING A CHRISTIAN AT AGE 32!
DID YOU KNOW? DWIGHT L. MOODY FOUNDED MOODY BIBLE INSTITUTE IN CHICAGO!
DID YOU KNOW? CHARLES SPURGEON WAS CALLED 'THE PRINCE OF PREACHERS'!
DID YOU KNOW? CHARLES SPURGEON'S SERMONS SOLD 25,000 COPIES PER WEEK!
DID YOU KNOW? JOHN WESLEY TRAVELED 250,000 MILES ON HORSEBACK PREACHING!
DID YOU KNOW? JOHN WESLEY PREACHED OVER 40,000 SERMONS IN HIS LIFETIME!
DID YOU KNOW? GEORGE WHITEFIELD PREACHED TO CROWDS OF 30,000 WITHOUT A MICROPHONE!

DID YOU KNOW? 90% OF THE KING JAMES BIBLE COMES FROM TYNDALE'S TRANSLATION!

DID YOU KNOW? ST. FRANCIS IS THE PATRON SAINT OF ANIMALS AND THE ENVIRONMENT!

DID YOU KNOW? ST. PATRICK WAS NOT ACTUALLY IRISH - HE WAS BRITISH!

TRUE OR FALSE: THE BIBLE NEVER SAYS THERE WERE THREE WISE MEN - TRUE! IT ONLY MENTIONS THREE GIFTS!
TRUE OR FALSE: JONAH WAS SWALLOWED BY A WHALE - FALSE! THE BIBLE SAYS 'GREAT FISH'!
TRUE OR FALSE: ADAM AND EVE ATE AN APPLE - FALSE! THE BIBLE JUST SAYS 'FRUIT'!
TRUE OR FALSE: MARY MAGDALENE WAS A PROSTITUTE - FALSE! THE BIBLE NEVER SAYS THIS!
TRUE OR FALSE: THE BIBLE SAYS 'MONEY IS THE ROOT OF ALL EVIL' - FALSE! IT'S 'LOVE OF MONEY'!
TRUE OR FALSE: DELILAH CUT SAMSON'S HAIR - FALSE! SHE HAD A MAN DO IT!
TRUE OR FALSE: ANGELS HAVE WINGS - SOME DO! SERAPHIM AND CHERUBIM HAVE WINGS!
TRUE OR FALSE: DAVID KILLED GOLIATH WITH A SLING - TRUE! ONE STONE TO THE FOREHEAD!
TRUE OR FALSE: NOAH TOOK 2 OF EVERY ANIMAL - FALSE! HE TOOK 7 PAIRS OF CLEAN ANIMALS!
TRUE OR FALSE: 'CLEANLINESS IS NEXT TO GODLINESS' IS IN THE BIBLE - FALSE!
TRUE OR FALSE: 'GOD HELPS THOSE WHO HELP THEMSELVES' IS IN THE BIBLE - FALSE!
TRUE OR FALSE: 'THIS TOO SHALL PASS' IS IN THE BIBLE - FALSE!
TRUE OR FALSE: THE FORBIDDEN FRUIT WAS IN THE GARDEN'S CENTER - TRUE! (GENESIS 3:3)
TRUE OR FALSE: JESUS WAS BORN ON DECEMBER 25TH - UNCERTAIN! THE DATE IS NOT IN THE BIBLE!
TRUE OR FALSE: JESUS WAS AN ONLY CHILD - FALSE! HE HAD BROTHERS AND SISTERS!
DID YOU KNOW? THE WORD 'CHRISTIAN' WAS FIRST USED IN ANTIOCH (ACTS 11:26)!
DID YOU KNOW? THE SHORTEST PRAYER IN THE BIBLE IS 'LORD, HELP ME!' (MATTHEW 15:25)!

DID YOU KNOW? 2 JOHN IS THE SHORTEST BOOK IN THE NEW TESTAMENT - JUST 13 VERSES!

DID YOU KNOW? ENOCH AND ELIJAH ARE THE ONLY TWO PEOPLE WHO NEVER DIED!

DID YOU KNOW? PHARAOH IS MENTIONED 274 TIMES IN THE BIBLE!

DID YOU KNOW? JONATHAN EDWARDS' SERMON 'SINNERS IN THE HANDS OF AN ANGRY GOD' SPARKED REVIVAL!
THE HEBREW WORD 'EMET' MEANS 'TRUTH' - IT'S SPELLED WITH THE FIRST, MIDDLE, AND LAST LETTERS OF THE ALPHABET!
THE HEBREW WORD 'TESHUVAH' MEANS 'REPENTANCE' - LITERALLY 'TO RETURN'!
THE HEBREW WORD 'KAVANAH' MEANS 'INTENTION' OR 'DEVOTION' IN PRAYER!
THE HEBREW WORD 'TZEDAKAH' MEANS 'RIGHTEOUSNESS' THROUGH CHARITABLE GIVING!
THE HEBREW WORD 'HESED' APPEARS 248 TIMES - IT MEANS LOYAL, COVENANT LOVE!
THE GREEK WORD 'AGAPE' MEANS UNCONDITIONAL, SACRIFICIAL LOVE!
THE GREEK WORD 'LOGOS' MEANS 'WORD' - JESUS IS CALLED THE LOGOS IN JOHN 1!
THE GREEK WORD 'EKKLESIA' MEANS 'CALLED OUT ONES' - TRANSLATED AS 'CHURCH'!
THE GREEK WORD 'KOINONIA' MEANS 'FELLOWSHIP' OR 'SHARING IN COMMON'!

THE BIBLE HAS BEEN BANNED, BURNED, AND OUTLAWED - YET IT REMAINS THE WORLD'S MOST PRINTED BOOK!
THE BIBLE IS THE MOST SHOPLIFTED BOOK IN THE WORLD!
A BIBLE WAS THE FIRST BOOK READ IN SPACE BY ASTRONAUT BUZZ ALDRIN!
THE OLDEST COMPLETE BIBLE IS THE CODEX SINAITICUS FROM THE 4TH CENTURY!
THE ETHIOPIAN BIBLE CONTAINS 81 BOOKS - MORE THAN ANY OTHER VERSION!
THE BIBLE USES THE NUMBER 40 TO REPRESENT TESTING OR TRIAL - IT APPEARS 146 TIMES!
THE NUMBER 7 REPRESENTS PERFECTION IN THE BIBLE - IT APPEARS OVER 700 TIMES!
THE NUMBER 12 REPRESENTS GOVERNMENTAL PERFECTION - 12 TRIBES, 12 APOSTLES!
THE APOSTLE PAUL'S ORIGINAL NAME WAS SAUL OF TARSUS!
JESUS SPOKE ARAMAIC AS HIS PRIMARY LANGUAGE!
